summary:
In response to "Fibroblasts in a cell-rich zone mainly secrete," Agent2 concluded that they predominantly release type I collagen due to its critical role in producing robust connective tissues within such regions based on available scientific literature emphasizing this specific function of these cells. The primary focus was identifying which among various options represented their main secretion related directly back to structural support functions typical of those cellular environments described by
